text: Entering this space, I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The sterile, minimal architecture and angled perspective unsettle my ordinary experience of passage. Turning a corner, I encounter a vibrant, information-rich display, its invitation to engage and learn momentarily distracting me from the initial sense of emptiness. I am awash with intrigue about the relationship between creation, technology, and the human spirit in spaces designed to provoke thought. Here, I am both observer and participant in unfolding meaning.
